about.introQ2: I've been there â€” and I can help.
about.body: I'm Usman â€” a Senior Cloud Solution Architect at Microsoft with 16+ years helping enterprise organizations across the Nordics and beyond adopt Azure, Microsoft 365, and AI. I bridge the gap between technology strategy and business outcomes, ensuring the platforms you've invested in actually transform how your organization works.
about.quote: Technology alone doesn't transform organizations. Adoption does. The gap between deploying tools and extracting value is where most digital transformations fail â€” and where I focus.

items.title: Cloud costs grow faster than the value delivered

items.title: Your teams use five tools for what one platform should do

items.desc: As Subject Matter Expert for Modern Work at Microsoft, drove M365 and Teams adoption programs that lifted engagement from pilot to full deployment â€” creating frameworks that scaled across entire organizations.

items.title: Discover & Assess

items.a: I work across three areas: cloud strategy and Azure architecture, GenAI and Microsoft Copilot, and Microsoft 365 Modern Work. Engagements range from focused advisory to full programme leadership.

items.q: How do you typically engage with clients?
items.a: Every engagement starts with a discovery phase to understand your technology landscape, business priorities, and adoption gaps. From there I design a tailored roadmap and support execution and change management.
Microsoft's platform is deeply integrated, enterprise-grade, and AI-native. The challenge isn't choosing the platform â€” it's unlocking the value already sitting in your estate.

items.q: What size organizations do you work with?
items.a: My background is enterprise â€” PostNord, Saab, and Microsoft's largest Nordic clients. I'm most effective in organizations with 500+ employees.

items.q: How do you approach AI adoption?
items.a: Adoption starts before deployment. I assess organizational readiness, design a governance framework, identify high-value use cases, and build an enablement programme.
I've spent 13+ years inside Microsoft, which means I understand the platform from the inside â€” not just from a customer or partner perspective.
